cast.name: 阿伯德拉马纳·希萨柯 Abderrahmane Sissako

trans_title: 阿伯德拉马纳·希萨柯：越界
introduction: 他不代表某个国家，他是艺术家；他不属于某个国家，他的电影对整个世界产生影响。他以一个艺术家的视角理解现实，以极具个性的电影语言讲述真实。阿伯德拉马纳·希萨柯，这位眼神充满忧郁的毛里塔利亚导演的人生充满了传奇。是哪个瞬间那扇电影的“窗户”真正向他敞开，是哪些挥之不去的故事藏于他的脑海，是怎样的智慧让他清晰而精准地化繁为简。马里、毛里塔利亚、俄罗斯...那些他曾经居住过的地方，那些他用电影记录过的国家，终将通过这部影片与你相遇。He does not represent a country, he is an artist; he does not belong to a country, his movies exert an impact on the whole world. He understands the world in an artist's angle, tells the truth in a highly personalized style. Abederamana Hissaco, with eyes full of melancholy, is a legendary Mauritanian director. Which moment is the window of movies really open to him? Which stories still lingering in his mind? What kind of wisdom allows him clear and accurate to simplify everything? The countries he once lived in, such as Mali, Mauritania and, Russia, with the countries he used to record, will meet you through this documentary.
chinese_title: 阿伯德拉马纳·希萨柯：越界
